title: The conflict exist when the same tablename are in different
poc: create table s1.A(a varchar(10) NOT NULL UNIQUE);
create table s2.A(a varchar(10) NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Same table name in different schemas
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s1.A(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE s2.A(id INT PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
